strategy: His resist is even (18% to most, 38% Life), so hit with any school except Life; Myth gets a small boost.
Never hit Pendragon with a spell costing more than 3 Pips. He answers with a 1,000 Death-drain Scarecrow that heals him. Chip him with cheap sub-4-pip spells.
Kill the White Dragon first using single-target attacks. White only punishes multi-target spells, and a single-target hit on the Black Dragon makes Black full-heal, so leave Black for AoE.
Once White is gone, switch to multi-target/AoE to bring down the Black Dragon, which only punishes single-target spells.
Keep buffs minimal. Both dragons strip Blades, Wards, Traps, and Curses and punish Heals, so set up light and finish Pendragon with low-pip hits.
cheatNotes: Pendragon punishes any damage spell costing more than 3 Pips.
A 4+ pip hit on Pendragon triggers a 1,000 Death-drain Scarecrow that heals him. Use cheap spells on him.
The Black Dragon punishes single-target spells.
Single-target effects on Black Dragon draw Shadow removal that ignores protection.
Damage spells that place an effect hit both the target and the caster with that removal.
A single-target damage-heal like Link keeps its heal-over-time but still triggers the single-target punish on you.
A single-target Blade triggers Disarm removing 1-3 Blades.
Globals trigger a single Disarm.
Single-target Wards trigger Pierce removing 1-3 Wards.
Single-target heal-over-times trigger Remove HOT taking 1-3 of them.
Healing makes Black Dragon cast Celestial Calendar on the healer.
Heal-over-times count as heals here.
A single-target DoT on Black Dragon triggers Triage removing 1-3 DoTs.
That DoT also triggers Black Dragon's single-target damage punish below.
Single-target damage on Black Dragon makes it Blessing-heal to full. Kill Black with AoE instead.
Single-target Traps on Black Dragon get Cleanse Warded, removing 1-3.
Prisms are not removed.
Single-target Curses on Black Dragon get Cleanse Charmed, removing 1-3.
The White Dragon punishes multi-target spells.
Multi-target effects on White Dragon draw Shadow removal that ignores protection.
A multi-target Blade triggers AoE Disarm removing 1-2 Blades.
A multi-target Shield triggers AoE Pierce removing 1-2 Wards.
A multi-target heal-over-time triggers AoE Remove HOT taking 1-2 of them.
A multi-target Heal makes White Dragon cast Frost Giant (530).
A multi-target DoT on White Dragon triggers Triage removing 1-3 DoTs.
That DoT also triggers White Dragon's multi-target damage punish below.
Multi-target damage on White Dragon makes it Blessing-heal to full. Kill White with single-target hits instead.
Multi-target Traps on White Dragon get Cleanse Warded, removing 1-3.
Prisms are not affected.
Multi-target Curses on White Dragon get Cleanse Charmed, removing 1-3.
